'''raraja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaboat|seaboat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaboat|seaboat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| raraja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræræjæth|ræræjæth]] || [[word:ræræjæj|ræræjæj]] || [[word:ræræjæsh|ræræjæsh]] || [[word:ræræjæ|ræræjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rararajath|rararajath]] || [[word:rararajaj|rararajaj]] || [[word:rararajash|rararajash]] || [[word:rararaja|rararaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rarajath|rarajath]] || [[word:rarajaj|rarajaj]] || [[word:rarajash|rarajash]] || [[word:raraja|raraja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarafjath|rarafjath]] || [[word:rarafjaj|rarafjaj]] || [[word:rarafjash|rarafjash]] || [[word:rarafjaf|rarafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarajatha|rarajatha]] || [[word:rarajaja|rarajaja]] || [[word:rarajasha|rarajasha]] || [[word:rarajaka|rarajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rarajath|rarajath]] || [[word:rarajaj|rarajaj]] || [[word:rarajash|rarajash]] || [[word:raraja|raraja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarajathal|rarajathal]] || [[word:rarajajal|rarajajal]] || [[word:rarajashal|rarajashal]] || [[word:rarajakal|rarajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarajathatha|rarajathatha]] || [[word:rarajajaja|rarajajaja]] || [[word:rarajashasha|rarajashasha]] || [[word:rarajaka|rarajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarajathan|rarajathan]] || [[word:rarajajan|rarajajan]] || [[word:rarajashan|rarajashan]] || [[word:rarajakan|rarajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarajathaoro|rarajathaoro]] || [[word:rarajajaoro|rarajajaoro]] || [[word:rarajashaoro|rarajashaoro]] || [[word:rarajakaoro|rarajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
